properties.name: P-204 (MN)
properties.remark: P-204 · SUPERIOR ROADLESS AREA, SUPERIOR NATIONAL FOREST · MN
properties.conditions:
Prohibited Area — flight prohibited at all times for reasons of national security or welfare (e.g., White House, Camp David, nuclear facilities). No-fly without explicit federal clearance.

Active times: CONTINUOUS
